title:
Gino Myers-Kyles on Instagram: "Coaches don’t play favorites—they play who they can trust. From the outside it might look personal, but inside the gym it’s about consistency. Who shows up the same every day? Who listens, competes, and does their job without needing to be reminded? That’s who earns minutes.

A lot of players think talent alone should guarantee opportunity, but coaches value dependability more than flashes. Effort, attitude, and discipline travel. If you’re locked in one day and coasting the next, your role will reflect that inconsistency. The game rewards what it can rely on."
description:

Who shows up the same every day? Who listens, competes, and does their job without needing to be reminded? That’s who earns minutes.

A lot of players think talent alone should guarantee opportunity, but coaches value dependability more than flashes. Effort, attitude, and discipline travel. If you’re locked in one day and coasting the next, your role will reflect that inconsistency. The game rewards what it can rely on.".
